name: Peppermint Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the cake flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar replacement until light and fluffy.
3. Add the egg and beat well.
4. Mix in the melted chocolate, peppermint oil, and vanilla extract.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients and milk alternately, beating after each addition.
6. Pour the batter into two greased 9-inch pans or one 9" x 13" pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
